meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Learn about Al-Hayaat School — our mission, vision, team, and commitment to nurturing young minds through academic excellence and spiritual development.
meta.og_description: Welcome to Al-Hayaat School, an educational institution dedicated to nurturing young minds through a unique blend of academic excellence and spiritual development.

hero.headline: About Al-Hayaat
hero.subtext: Welcome to Al-Hayaat School, an educational institution dedicated to nurturing young minds through a unique blend of academic excellence and spiritual development. Located in the heart of the Kitchener-Waterloo region, our school is set to become a beacon of knowledge and values for the local Muslim community.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: Our mission is to shape individuals who are academically competent, spiritually grounded, and morally upright, ready to contribute to society with confidence and pride in their identity.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: At Al-Hayaat School, we believe in empowering students with a holistic education rooted in the teachings of the Holy Quran and the principles of Ahlulbayt [A.S.].

team.heading: Our Team

members.name: Dr. Hamid Reza Mohebbi
members.bio: Senior Scientist at Quantum Valley Investments in Waterloo and a passionate advocate for community development and education grounded in the teachings of the Qur'an and Ahlulbayt (AS). With more than 30 years of experience in academia across both high school and university settings, Dr. Mohebbi is among the founding members of several schools in Canada. He is an active educator and researcher in Islamic Studies and has dedicated many years to serving and strengthening local communities through education and leadership.

members.name: Zaman Alkhafagi
members.bio: An experienced leader in municipal service delivery and currently serves as a Supervisor at the Regional Municipality of Waterloo. His work focuses on strategic planning, resident experience, communications, and optimizing public-sector service delivery. With expertise in operations management, stakeholder engagement, and educational leadership, Zaman is committed to enhancing community services, driving innovation, and fostering impactful learning environments.

members.name: Ms. Alaa Namus
members.bio: An experienced educator and dedicated leader committed to fostering academic excellence and Islamic values. She holds a Certification in Teaching English as a Second Language (TESL) and a Certification in School Management and Leadership (CSML) – Leading Learning. As Principal of Al-Hayaat School, Ms. Alaa Namus is dedicated to creating a faith-centered and engaging learning environment that empowers students to excel academically and spiritually.

team.boardCaption: Board of Directors — from left to right: Syed Safdar, Zaman AlKhafagi, Hamid Reza Mohebbi, Muhammad Sajjad, Mohamed Jeafer

why.heading: Why Al-Hayaat?
why.intro: Al-Hayaat School offers a unique educational experience that seamlessly integrates values with academic excellence. Here's why we stand out:

cards.title: Faith-based education
cards.description: At Al-Hayaat School, our mission is deeply rooted in the teachings of the Quran and the principles of Ahlulbayt [a.s.]. We emphasize the importance of living a pure life حَيِّيَةٌ طَيِّبَةٌ, fostering qualities such as honesty, patience, respect, and compassion in our students.

cards.title: Comprehensive curriculum
cards.description: Our curriculum blends Ontario's academic standards with Islamic studies, Quranic education, and Arabic language. This combination ensures students receive a well-rounded education that nurtures intellectual growth while strengthening their identity.

cards.title: Commitment to academic excellence
cards.description: We provide a high-quality education that equips students with the tools they need to thrive in modern society. Our focus on intellectual development, physical health, and recreational activities ensures a holistic learning experience.

cards.title: Community-focused vision
cards.description: Al-Hayaat School is dedicated to fostering a nurturing environment where students grow into skilled professionals, compassionate leaders, and contributors to the Shia community and humanity at large.

office.heading: Our Office
office.description: Our location at 1095 Bleams Rd, Petersburg, ON provides a serene and accessible environment conducive to learning and growth. With state-of-the-art facilities and a dedicated team of educators, Al-Hayaat School aims to inspire the next generation of leaders, innovators, and contributors to humanity.

cta.heading: Join our community
cta.body: Together, we're building a brighter future for our children and the community.
